description: The Elm Street Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance, part of the larger Bloods alliance, originating in Compton, California. It has spread to other U.S. cities including Brooklyn, Atlanta, and Virginia. The gang has been involved in criminal activities such as recruiting high school students and conspiracy to murder a witness. It remains active as of the 2020s.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Started in Compton, California, but now active in various cities across the United States such as Norfolk, Virginia and Various cities in Virginia, Newark, New Jersey, St.Louis, Missouri, Atlanta, Georgia, Brooklyn, New York, Jamaica Queens, New York
country_links.context: The organization is active in various cities across the United States, including Norfolk, Virginia; Newark, New Jersey; St. Louis, Missouri; Atlanta, Georgia; Brooklyn, New York; and Jamaica Queens, New York.
